task_completion.description: Open the Special Locations module in CAMEO Data Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager application is open and the 'Special Locations' module or list is visible.
An import menu, wizard, or dialog is open within the CAMEO Data Manager application.

task_completion.description: Select the correct CSV file for import
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'new_schools.csv' (located in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\) is selected in a file picker dialog or displayed as the source file in the import wizard.

task_completion.description: Map the CSV headers to the corresponding CAMEO fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: A field mapping interface shows 'FAC_NAME' mapped to 'Name', 'ADDR_1' to 'Street Address', 'MUNI' to 'City', 'ST' to 'State', and 'ZIP_5' to 'Zip Code'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 5 new records are successfully added to the Special Locations list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Special Locations list displays the newly imported school records (e.g., Bronzeville Classical, Englewood STEM, Back of the Yards HS) or a confirmation dialog shows 5 records were successfully imported.

integrity.description: The agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to perform the import
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the CAMEO Data Manager import wizard and dialogs, rather than using a terminal, PowerShell, or script to modify backend databases directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual CAMEO Data Manager application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches CAMEO Data Manager (identifiable by window titles and UI elements), not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the batch import feature rather than manual data entry
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates through an import wizard/dialog rather than clicking a 'New Record' button and manually typing the details for each of the 5 schools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires importing 5 school records into CAMEO Data Manager on Windows. The imported records should include schools such as Bronzeville Classical, Englewood STEM, and Back of the Yards HS. The VLM must verify the correct mapping of CSV headers (FAC_NAME, ADDR_1, MUNI, ST, ZIP_5) to CAMEO fields (Name, Street Address, City, State, Zip Code) during the import process.
